message:
🐛 Add click affordance styling to 'View previous missions' button (#10712)

Add cursor-pointer, hover underline, hover background highlight, and
focus-visible ring to the mission history toggle button so it clearly
communicates interactivity.

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
